basic_details.job_title: NABFINS Customer Service Officer - IT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NABARD Financial Services (NABFINS) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Customer Service Officer - IT Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 29-07-2026. In this article, you'll find the Customer Service Officer - IT recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, email application procedure, and direct links to the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Diploma in IT or Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology or a related field.
qualification.details: Customer Service Officer - IT: Graduate Diploma in IT or Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology or a related field.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NABFINS Customer Service Officer - IT Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NABFINS Customer Service Officer - IT Job 2026 Notification PDF

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NABFINS Customer Service Officer - IT Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NABFINS Customer Service Officer - IT Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NABFINS Customer Service Officer - IT recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Customer Service Officer - IT position is 29th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Customer Service Officer - IT post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate Diploma in IT or a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification released by NABFINS for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Customer Service Officer - IT position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their resume via email to [email protected] before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for this role?
faq.answer: The job type for the Customer Service Officer - IT position is Full Time.

faq.question: Q6. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: NABARD Financial Services (NABFINS) is conducting this recruitment drive for the Customer Service Officer - IT post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Nabhins/OPS/1120.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the Head Office in Bengaluru, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q9. Are freshers eligible to apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, the eligibility criteria mention that freshers are welcome to apply for the Customer Service Officer - IT position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
